This directory needs a gradle-wrapper.jar file to make gradlew/gradlew.bat
work standalone. It's a small compiled binary distributed by Gradle, and
isn't included in this scaffold since it isn't source code.

To generate it, run once (requires a local Gradle install or Android Studio):
  gradle wrapper --gradle-version 8.8

Or simply open android/ in Android Studio — it will regenerate the wrapper
jar automatically on first sync.

gradle-wrapper.properties (which points at the correct Gradle version) is
already included in this folder.
